alpha.description: Shape parameter of the gamma distribution for the component's time to failure. Used in the answer as the upper limit of the summation (sum from i=0 to alpha-1=2).

beta.description: Scale parameter of the gamma distribution for the component's time to failure. Used in the answer to compute the ratio t/beta.

t.description: The time point (10 time-units) at which the reliability of the component is evaluated.
